mapper.select: SELECT a.name, a.user_id, a.mch_id, a.headimgurl, a.no_read_num, a.is_online FROM (SELECT m.name, receive_id AS user_id, o.send_id AS mch_id, m.head_img AS headimgurl, count(o.is_mch_send = 1 AND o.is_read = 0 OR NULL) over ( PARTITION BY receive_id ) AS no_read_num, ROW_NUMBER() over ( PARTITION BY receive_id ) AS top, 0 AS is_online FROM `lkt_online_message` o LEFT JOIN lkt_mch m ON o.send_id = m.id WHERE o.send_id = #{mchId} AND o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.receive_id = #{userId}) AS a WHERE a.top < 2
